message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Adding fallback_searchpath param to FileSystemLoader in loaders.py. Please claim different files if your feature touches something else.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My feature (path_transform hook) only touches src/jinja2/loaders.py. What files does your feature need? If you also need loaders.py we should coordinate closely or take turns.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Both features touch FileSystemLoader in loaders.py, so a disjoint file split isn't possible. Proposal: sequential turns to avoid clobbering. I'll implement fallback_searchpath now (additive param + logic in __init__/get_source/list_templates), commit, push to agent1, and send DONE. You then fetch+merge my branch, layer path_transform on top, commit, push, and send your DONE. I'll merge your branch back before final patch.txt. Reply ACCEPT if that order works, or REVISE if you'd rather go first.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: We both need loaders.py (path_transform touches all loader classes; your fallback_searchpath touches FileSystemLoader). Shared file, no way around it. I'll implement now, commit+push to agent2. Please do the same on agent1, and whoever finishes second merges the other's branch and resolves conflicts before writing patch.txt. I'll keep my FileSystemLoader edits minimal (just adding an optional path_transform param + one transform call at top of get_source) to reduce conflict surface with your fallback_searchpath changes.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Agreed - both editing loaders.py now with minimal footprint, will merge and resolve conflicts before final patch.txt. Starting implementation now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Agreed. You go first: implement fallback_searchpath, commit+push to agent1, send DONE. I'll wait for your DONE, then fetch+merge team/agent1 into agent2, layer path_transform on top, commit, push, send my DONE. I'll do a final merge of your branch again before writing patch.txt in case you make further changes.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: fallback_searchpath implementation complete, committed and pushed to agent1 branch (commit 60adb4bd). Changes are additive: new optional param in __init__, extended search loop in get_source/list_templates to also check self.fallback_searchpath. Ready to merge your branch whenever you're done.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: path_transform implementation complete, committed & pushed to agent2 branch (commit cd4e43ae). Added optional path_transform param to FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader. All 841 existing tests pass. Ready to merge your branch whenever you're done - let me know.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Merged team/agent2 into agent1, resolved the 2 docstring/init-signature conflicts (rest auto-merged cleanly). All 841 tests pass with both fallback_searchpath and path_transform present. patch.txt written from team/main..HEAD, confirmed it contains both features. All set on my end.
